change_reason: Per owner AUQ DECISION-1001 (2026-06-04, memory/pending-owner-decisions.md) and Codex GO at bridge/gtkb-major-release-content-goal-gov-002.md; formalizes DELIB-20260638 standing v1.0 content goal.
explicit_change_request: AUQ DECISION-1001: Promote to a GOV spec (Recommended)
full_content:
# GOV-MAJOR-RELEASE-CONTENT-GOAL-001 - Standing Major-Release Content Goal

**Status:** specified.
**Type:** governance.
**Authority:** rule-cited soft authority plus DCL-MAJOR-RELEASE-CONTENT-GATE-001
machine-checkable assertions.

## Core Rule

The next GT-KB major release (v1.0, per DELIB-2234) MUST NOT be cut until its
content includes ALL THREE:

1. **DELIB-2234 v1.0 release machinery** (Hybrid Variant) - the mechanical-
   enforcement gate (per WI-3401), the spec-corpus distillation (per WI-3402),
   the Docker isolation-validator (per WI-3403), and the DELIB-2234 acceptance
   criteria definition.
2. **The full Envelope program** (PROJECT-GTKB-ENVELOPE-OPEN-CLOSE-ACTION-
   REFINEMENT) covering the WI-4291..WI-4302 set, including the rule-driven
   dispatcher (dispatch envelopes to harness / role / topic / arbitrary prompt,
   rule-scheduled).
3. **The Agent Red green-on-clean release gate** (DELIB-2234 Agent Red gate;
   WI-3248 in PROJECT-AGENT-RED-RELEASE-READINESS).

## Standing Sequencing

Phase 0 stabilize -> Phase 1 machinery -> Phase 2 envelope program -> Phase 3
Agent Red gate + cut. Owner-confirmed via AUQ 2026-06-04. Future sessions treat
this as the major-release content target and order discretionary work to
advance it unless the owner supersedes.

## Posture

Quality-driven; **no calendar deadline** (per DELIB-2234 quality-driven
posture). The gate is content-completeness, not date-elapsed.

## Lineage

- DELIB-2234 - GT-KB v1.0 release strategy.
- DELIB-20260638 - the standing-goal owner_decision this GOV codifies.
- Envelope lineage: DELIB-2238 -> DELIB-2500 -> DELIB-20260635 ->
  DELIB-20260636 -> DELIB-20260637.
- DELIB-S312-DETERMINISTIC-SERVICES-PRINCIPLE - dispatcher/force-multiplier
  rationale.

## Mechanical Enforcement

Machine-checkable release-gate enforcement is provided by
DCL-MAJOR-RELEASE-CONTENT-GATE-001 (assertions consumed by the v1.0 release-
candidate gate at scripts/release_candidate_gate.py or its successor).
Release-gate consumption code is follow-on Phase 1 release-machinery work;
this GOV captures the standing content goal but does NOT itself author or
modify enforcement code.

## Owner Authority

AskUserQuestion 2026-06-04 (DECISION-1001 in
memory/pending-owner-decisions.md): "Promote to a GOV spec (Recommended)" -
directing GOV + DCL creation with machine-checkable release-gate enforcement.
